name: Apolis Inc.
lede: Apolis runs three centers across three Indian cities. Chennai, Gurugram and Noida, covering CoE, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Apolis office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Apolis Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Apolis runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Chennai, Gurugram, Noida), covering CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

titles.title: Global IT Leader - Head of Offshore Services

about.description: Apolis's India footprint covers Chennai, Gurugram and Noida, spanning CoE. The centers deliver IT, HR and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all ten decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Apolis operate in India?
faq.a: Apolis operates 3 active centers in India. Four are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Apolis have centers in?
faq.a: Apolis's India footprint includes Chennai and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Apolis run in India?
faq.a: Apolis runs CoE centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Apolis's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Apolis's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Apolis's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Apolis's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
